title: SuppDB - Supplements & Nootropics (Sample)
subtitle: Real supplement labels: mg doses, proprietary blends, PubChem chemistry
description:
# SuppDB - Supplements & Nootropics Dataset (Free Sample)

A structured dataset of real supplement & nootropic products, built **exclusively from the public [NIH Dietary Supplement Label Database (DSLD)](https://dsld.od.nih.gov/)** - every active ingredient normalized to **milligrams**, proprietary blends flagged where the dose is undisclosed, and each compound enriched with **NIH PubChem** chemical identity. A **source label ID + URL on every record** means any fact can be re-verified.

Think *INCIDecoder for supplements*: **one row per active ingredient**, with its dose, form, safety reference, and molecular identity. Built only from **public-domain U.S. Government data** (NIH DSLD + PubChem).

This Kaggle dataset is the **free sample - 2,249 ingredient records across 300 real products from 218 brands**. The full dataset - **17,000+ products from 2,000+ brands, 115,000+ active-ingredient records** - is available at [suppdb.net](https://supplements-nootropics-suppdb.pages.dev).

## What makes it useful

- **Normalized mg dosages** - `mcg`, `g`, and substance-specific `IU` handled correctly (Vitamin D 1,000 IU -> 0.025 mg, not a bogus flat factor).
- **Proprietary-blend transparency** - ingredients whose dose is hidden on the label are flagged `is_proprietary_blend = 1` with `amount = 0`; you can see the hidden-dose ingredients, not just miss them.
- **PubChem chemistry + canonicalization** - `pubchem_cid`, `molecular_formula`, `molecular_weight`, `canonical_smiles`, `inchikey`. Rows sharing an InChIKey are the same molecule under different names (e.g. Vitamin C / Ascorbic Acid), so you can canonicalize deterministically.
- **NIH DRI reference intakes** - `recommended_daily_mg` / `upper_safety_limit_mg` from authoritative NIH DRIs, NULL where none exists (never invented).
- **Honest, uneven coverage** - botanicals and blends legitimately lack chemistry/reference values. NULL means no established value, not missing.

## Field coverage (full dataset)

| Field | Coverage | | Field | Coverage |
| :--- | ---: | --- | :--- | ---: |
| Brand / product / ingredient | 100% | | Proprietary-blend flag | 37% of rows |
| UPC barcode | 86% | | RDA / upper limit (NIH DRI) | ~9% |
| Dose normalized to mg | 100% | | PubChem CID / formula / weight | ~25% |
| Servings per container | 85% | | SMILES / InChIKey | ~25% |

## Columns

See the column descriptions tab - every field is documented. A starter notebook demonstrating loading, tabular preview, dose & proprietary-blend analysis, and chemistry/provenance is attached.

## License & attribution

The **sample** is shared under **CC-BY-NC-4.0** (attribution, non-commercial). The **full commercial dataset** is licensed separately via [suppdb.net](https://supplements-nootropics-suppdb.pages.dev). Underlying facts are public-domain (NIH DSLD + PubChem). **Not medical advice** - verify against the current physical label.

**Full dataset & updates:** https://supplements-nootropics-suppdb.pages.dev

resources.description: 2,249 active-ingredient records across 300 real supplement products from 218 brands. One row per (product x active ingredient), with normalized mg dose, proprietary-blend flag, NIH DRI reference intakes, NIH PubChem chemistry, and full DSLD provenance.

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: SuppDB product identifier (stable within a snapshot). Multiple rows share it - one per active ingredient.

fields.name: brand
fields.description: Brand / manufacturer as printed on the label.

fields.name: product_name
fields.description: Product name as listed on the NIH DSLD label.

fields.name: upc_barcode
fields.description: UPC / GTIN barcode. A 'DSLD-<id>' placeholder is used where the label has no printed barcode (86% are real barcodes).

fields.name: form_type
fields.description: Physical form: Capsule, Tablet, Powder, Softgel Capsule, Liquid, etc.

fields.name: serving_size_count
fields.description: Number of units per serving (e.g. 2 capsules).

fields.name: serving_size_unit
fields.description: Unit of the serving size (capsule, softgel, scoop, mL, ...).

fields.name: servings_per_container
fields.description: Servings per container, from the DSLD label where the manufacturer stated it (85% populated); NULL otherwise.

fields.name: ingredient
fields.description: Canonical ingredient name (DSLD ingredient group), e.g. Magnesium, Vitamin C, Ashwagandha.

fields.name: ingredient_form
fields.description: Specific form as listed on the label, e.g. Magnesium Bisglycinate, Ascorbic Acid.

fields.name: ingredient_category
fields.description: DSLD ingredient category: mineral, vitamin, botanical, amino acid, fatty acid, etc.

fields.name: amount_per_serving_mg
fields.description: Dose per serving normalized to milligrams. 0 means the dose is undisclosed inside a proprietary blend (see is_proprietary_blend).

fields.name: is_proprietary_blend
fields.description: 1 = this ingredient's per-serving dose is undisclosed on the label (hidden in a proprietary blend; amount_per_serving_mg is 0). 0 = disclosed.

fields.name: recommended_daily_mg
fields.description: Recommended daily intake in mg, from authoritative NIH Dietary Reference Intakes. NULL where no official value exists (most herbs, amino acids, nootropics).

fields.name: upper_safety_limit_mg
fields.description: NIH DRI Tolerable Upper Intake Level in mg. NULL where none has been established.

fields.name: pubchem_cid
fields.description: NIH PubChem Compound ID. NULL for botanicals / multi-component blends with no single PubChem compound.

fields.name: molecular_formula
fields.description: Molecular formula from NIH PubChem, e.g. C8H10N4O2. NULL where not a single defined compound.

fields.name: molecular_weight
fields.description: Molecular weight (g/mol) from NIH PubChem. NULL where not a single defined compound.

fields.name: inchikey
fields.description: PubChem InChIKey: a canonical chemical key. Rows sharing an InChIKey are the same molecule regardless of label name (use to canonicalize variants).

fields.name: canonical_smiles
fields.description: Canonical SMILES structure string from NIH PubChem. NULL where not a single defined compound.

fields.name: dsld_label_id
fields.description: NIH DSLD label identifier (provenance).

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Exact NIH DSLD label URL the record was extracted from (re-verifiable provenance).

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Snapshot identifier, e.g. 2026.07.
